changes.citation: Four residual risks documented across sprint notes: (1) Gate A approval record empty in LC-S12B notes — programme ran without formal three-party sign-off; review must assess whether this constitutes a process gap. (2) LC-S18A package estate inventory refresh deferred — ~109 orphan packages not in KB-S49 inventory; metadata-driven WHY discovery blocked until resolved. (3) No Playwright render verification or stale UI banner (LC-S20/22 residual); render-level coverage is documentation-only, not machine-enforced. (4) Derived-marker orchestrator phase still monolithic (LC-S21 residual) — partial decomposition only. None of these are CONTENT-sprint blockers; they form the evidence base for the GO/GO WITH CONDITIONS/NO-GO transition decision.

verdict: HARDENED. No blockers. All five front-matter fields valid. risk_level STANDARD and change_type CONTENT correctly classified. All 9 mandatory authority paths confirmed present and content-verified. All 10 optional inspect files confirmed present. All 12 smoke pack test files confirmed present on disk.
